content:
# Session 74 (iter-074) ‚ÄĒ review

## Metadata
- File edited (SOLO `prove` lane): `‚Ä¶/DualInverse/PresheafDualPullback.lean`.
- Sorry (this file): **3 ‚Üí 1** (real sorries; L273-274 are comment text). Sole residual: `hstar` (‚ėÖ) at L855.
- Build: `lake build ‚Ä¶PresheafDualPullback` **EXIT 0** (8324 jobs); **axiom-clean** (verified `lean_verify` on closed decls ‚ÄĒ propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound only).
- Global: TensorObjInverse.lean {1128,1186,1222,1990} unchanged; SliceTransport.lean sorry-free.

## Targets

### 1. `presheafDual_pullback_comparison_eval_apply` (L377 consumer) ‚ÄĒ SOLVED
- `unfold PresheafOfModules.evalLin; erw [sliceDualTransport_app_apply f M V ŌÜ (op (Over.mk (ūĚüô V.unop))) s, dualUnitRingSwap_apply]; rfl`.
- Key: `evalLin` exposes section app via `ConcreteCategory.hom`, forward brick keyed on `ModuleCat.Hom.hom` ‚ÄĒ defeq not syntactic ‚Üí `rw` misses, `erw` required. Consumes the iter-073 forward `sliceDualTransport_app_apply`. Off critical path.

### 2. `evalLin_restrict_commute_aux` (L434, off-path) ‚ÄĒ SOLVED
- Direct term-mode `(PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply (PresheafOfModules.internalHomEval N) j.op (s ‚äó‚āú[(R‚āÄ.obj (op U) : Type u)] ŌÜ)).symm`.
- Key: prior-pass multi-step `have key := ‚Ä¶; erw [tensorObj_map_tmul, internalHomEvalApp_tmul] at key; exact key.symm` whnf-BOMBS the `TensorProduct.lift` machinery at the `erw`. One-shot `exact (‚Ä¶).symm` unifies up to defeq (the `_tmul` reductions hold definitionally) ‚Üí no bomb. The feared private `restr_map_homMk`/`hom_app_heq` re-exposure was **not** needed.

### 3. `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` (c.2, L710) ‚ÄĒ PARTIAL (reduced to single residual)
- **Headline: the iter-071 trip-wire CLEARED.** The whole iter-071 H1-cancellation factorisation is now **compiling code** via a NEW generic single-`[Category C]` lemma `c2_assemble` (~L660-695, `private`, 8 equation-hyps, all consumed ‚ÄĒ real category algebra, axiom-free), `refine`-applied to the c.2 goal with 11 structural facts (two iso-cancellations, `hcoc`=`presheafDualH1Cocycle`, `pbC` cancel, ONE `H1h.hom` naturality at `gf=őł_f.hom`, `pushforward ő≤h`-fold, `H1h` cancel, residual ‚ąó‚ąó).
- **CRITICAL verified fact:** `refine c2_assemble (named args‚Ä¶)` crosses the `PresheafOfModules`-over-`Z` defeq-but-not-syntactic `‚Čę` seam by **metavariable-assignment unification with NO whnf bomb** (lake EXIT 0). This is precisely the device iter-071's trip-wire feared would bomb ‚ÄĒ it did NOT. `hfold` discharged inline (L820-825).
- **Sole residual (‚ėÖ) `hstar` (L855):** `FC.hom.app dM ‚Čę sDT_{h‚Čęf} = (pushforward ő≤h).map(sDT_f) ‚Čę sDT_h(M|f) ‚Čę dualIsoOfIso(rfc).hom` ‚ÄĒ the pushforward-flank `sliceDualTransport` pseudofunctoriality (exact dual of a chunk of the tensor `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` interleave). Blocked on `FC = leftAdjointCompIso` opacity.
- Attempts on (‚ėÖ): (1) `rw [show FC.hom = pushforwardComp.hom from rfl]` FAILS ‚ÄĒ `leftAdjointCompIso` NOT defeq to concrete `pushforwardComp` (type mismatch + 3.2M-HB bomb), even though `pushforwardComp = Iso.refl`. (2) `apply PresheafOfModules.hom_ext; intro V` SUCCEEDS to the sectionwise goal but `FC.hom.app dM` stays OPAQUE (unfolding `leftAdjointCompIso` unit/counit bombs). Left as documented scaffold.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Generic single-`[Category C]` skeleton + `refine` is the seam-crossing closer.** Where every keyed `rw`/`simp`/`erw`/`set`/`cancel_epi` whnf-bombs across the over-`Z` `‚Čę` seam (iter-071 confirmed), lifting the entire diagram-chase to ONE abstract-category lemma and `refine`-applying it crosses the seam by pure mv-assignment ‚ÄĒ NO whnf. This generalises the iter-068+ "generic single-`[Category C]` lemma by `exact`" idiom from one brick to the whole reduction.
- **One-shot term-mode `exact` beats the multi-step `have ‚Ä¶; erw ‚Ä¶; exact` whnf-bomb** (L434): when the goal IS a naturality square up to defeq, hand the bundled-Hom `naturality_apply` directly; don't pre-rewrite the tmul legs.
- **(‚ėÖ) is a genuine NEW deep residual, not the brick-tail the trip-wire warned about.** The assembly succeeded cleanly; (‚ėÖ) is the residual it cleanly isolated ‚ÄĒ the dual-flank pseudofunctoriality blocked on `FC`-opacity, very likely needing a CROSS-FILE forward sectionwise brick in `SliceTransport.lean`.

## Convergence note
- 5+ iters of c.2 re-characterisation (067-071), a no-op (072), the forward brick (073) ‚ÄĒ and now (074) the reduction is **realised in code** and c.2 reduces to a single, sharply-named residual. Net file sorry 3‚Üí1 (first target-file elimination on this route since the lane began). The progress-critic's STUCK (sorry 3‚Üí3 √ó5) is broken: 2 sorries closed + c.2 reduced. But (‚ėÖ) is a fresh deep obstruction (FC-opacity) ‚ÄĒ not a trivial finish; see recommendations.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:presheafdual_eval_restrict_commute_apply` (L3a): **deleted stale `% NOTE (iter-066)`** falsely claiming the lemma is transitively `sorry` via `evalLin_restrict_commute_aux := sorry`, and **restored `\leanok`** on the proof block (manual override). Justified: `evalLin_restrict_commute_aux` was CLOSED this iter; `lean_verify` on `presheafDual_eval_restrict_commute_apply` ‚Üí axiom-clean (no `sorryAx`); build green-mod-sorry with the only sorry at L710. The 2026 `sync_leanok` ran with 0 changes (the manual NOTE-override had suppressed the marker), so the override is mine to restore.

## Subagent reports (see task_results/)
- `lean-auditor-iter074`: PASS ‚ÄĒ 0 must-fix / 0 major / 4 minor. L855 sorry HONEST; `c2_assemble` non-vacuous, all 8 hyps consumed; L377/L434 real proofs; hstar comment block accurate, no laundering. Minors: stale comments (L273 "as here", L660 docstring "eleven"‚Č†8, L453 stale 3-step plan), and L2/L3a/L3b possibly file-internal-dead (exported decls).
- `lean-vs-blueprint-checker-presheafdualpullback-iter074`: PASS ‚ÄĒ 0 must-fix, 3 major / 4 minor. c.2 statement is a leg-for-leg match (12/12 closed decls faithful). Majors are blueprint-side debt ‚Üí recommendations: (M1) tex L8150-8152 c.2 proof names FICTIONAL helper trio `comp_cancel_mid`/`comp_slide_nested`/`comp_cancel_three_lr`, omits the real `c2_assemble`; (M2) stale L3a NOTE [FIXED this review]; (M3) `hstar` blueprint sketch too thin (silent on FC-opacity blocker, needs ¬ß0 mate route).
